Name: Vaonis Dual Band Filter
Description: The Vespera Dual Band Filter is a narrow-band interference filter that significantly improves the quality of your images, whether you are photographing in the city or in nature. By precisely selecting the wavelengths of hydrogen alpha (H-alpha) and oxygen III (O-III), which are mainly found in nebulae, the filter increases the contrast between the star object and the sky background. This results in a better image quality with sharper stars and finer details. Features: Improves the photo quality Ideal for nebula photography Increases the contrast between the sky background and the star object Refines stars and details The dual-band filter only allows two specific wavelengths to pass through to the Vespera sensor: O-III and H-alpha Can be used at full aperture The objective ring is equipped with an electronic microcard that allows Vespera to recognise the dual-band filter and adjust its observation and image processing parameters The filter has a bandwidth of 12 nm at each wavelength (O-III = 500.7 nm, H-alpha = 656.3 nm)

Name: Vaonis CLS Light Pollution Filter
Description: The Vespera light pollution filter or CLS (City Light Suppression) filter can help you improve the quality of your photos when observing in the city or suburbs. It attenuates the effects of light pollution and thus increases the contrast between the object photographed in the sky and the background sky. Essential for observing from an environment with high levels of light pollution (urban and suburban environments, residential lighting, etc.) Improves the quality of fog photography. The broadband filter blocks wavelengths of Na (sodium) and Hg (mercury), which are mainly from urban night lighting or unwanted natural light (atmospheric oxygen radiation, etc.) while it passes through the main wave lengths of celestial objects. The light pollution filter is particularly useful to improve the brightness of deep-sky objects: nebulae, star clusters, galaxies, etc. Because of the filtered wavelengths, it is particularly effective in emission nebulae. Features: CLS Filter for Vespera (AC023) Transparent storage box Dimensions: depth: 0.6 cm, width: 7.80 cm Color: Black (outside) Materials: glass, plastic Weight: about 15 g

Easy to use Frequently recurring scanning tasks can be called up directly and completed in a time-saving manner using the seven preconfigurable one-touch function keys located on the device. Accurate colour reproduction and high dynamic range The A320E's CCD sensor delivers excellent dynamic density. It enables a high level of detail in dark areas and a wide colour spectrum. Especially when scanning artwork, colour drawings or sensitive originals, the scanner offers optimal results in high quality. Name: Garmin Venu 4 45mm Smartwatch Silver with Silver Grey Silicon Band
Description: The Garmin Venu 4 45 mm combines modern smartwatch functionality with comprehensive health and fitness tracking in an elegant, compact case. At its heart is a bright, colour AMOLED touchscreen display that offers excellent readability and optional always-on mode. This makes the watch suitable for everyday use and leisure as well as for sports, outdoor activities or training sessions. Thanks to built-in sensors and functions, the Venu 4 provides a wide range of health data — including heart rate, blood oxygen (Pulse Ox), sleep analysis, and support from the integrated app for ECG and other vital functions. The watch goes beyond simple fitness trackers and offers features such as training readiness, ‘training status’ and — optionally — offline music storage and smart notifications when connected to a smartphone. It is built with robust materials for sports and outdoor use: the case is made of stainless steel and fibre-reinforced polymer, and the display is protected by Corning Gorilla Glass 3. At the same time, the watch is water-resistant to 5 ATM - it can withstand pressure up to 50 metres, making it suitable for swimming and everyday use in wet conditions. Despite its numerous features, the Venu 4 remains surprisingly compact and lightweight — it is designed for users who value everyday usability and comfort. With 8 GB of internal memory, a built-in speaker and microphone, and features such as music, calls and Garmin Pay, it is much more than just a simple sports watch - it functions as a fully-fledged smartwatch for everyday use, fitness and health. Features: 1.4-inch / 3.53 cm AMOLED touch display (454 x 454 pixels), Always-On optional Fibre-reinforced polymer case, stainless steel bezel, Gorilla Glass 3 Water resistance: 5 ATM 8 GB internal memory Functions: Heart rate sensor 1 , blood oxygen measurement (Pulse Ox), sleep analysis, ECG app support Training Readiness, Training Status, automatic activity detection, Multi-Band GNSS Music storage and playback via Bluetooth headphones Built-in speaker and microphone (phone calls, voice functions) Smart notifications when paired with a smartphone Integrated LED torch Garmin Pay (contactless payment) Battery life: up to 12 days in smartwatch mode Suitable for wrist circumferences from 135 to 200 mm Dimensions: 45 x 12 x 45 mm Weight: 56 g 1 This product is not a medical device and is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

Name: Apple Watch Ultra 3 49mm Cellular Black with Charcoal Trail Loop (M/L)
Tags: Apple Watch Ultra 3, apple-watch, Smart Watch
Description: Your ultimate running companion with advanced metrics, training load and the best GPS in a sports watch. Running | Optimise every stride. Calling all runners. Apple Watch Ultra 3 has everything you need to train smarter and reach your personal best. Powerful features like precision dual-frequency GPS, advanced metrics, Custom Workouts and new Workout Buddy help you ace your pace. Hit the ground running with the Action button. It's customisable and gives you quick control over a variety of functions, so you can do things like control a workout, move to your next interval, mark a segment and more. All with extreme precision. All you need is your watch. Ultra 3 has mobile connectivity built in, so you can stay better connected on the go. With a carrier plan, you can keep in touch almost anywhere, even if you've left your iPhone behind to go for a run. Advance with advanced metrics. Track your progress with metrics like running power and cadence. And if you create a Custom Workout on your watch or iPhone, you can add work and recovery intervals, set a pace for outdoor workouts and more. You can even get an estimate of your VO2 max after your run. Track your training load. Helpful insights from training load show the impact your workouts have on your body over time, so it's easier to plan when to push and when to rest - especially useful when you're training for your next big event. A battery built for stamina. Apple Watch Ultra 3 is engineered to give you even longer battery life - so you can go further and wider than ever before. When you do need to power up, you can fast-charge in just 15 minutes for up to 12 hours of normal use. On the go | Satellite communications. Up and running. Now when you're off the grid without mobile connectivity or Wi-Fi, Ultra 3 can help you stay connected using built-in satellite communications.1 So if you need critical help, you can contact emergency services via satellite - straight from your wrist. Get help with Emergency SOS via satellite. With a few simple taps, Ultra 3 can gather critical information, connect you to a satellite and reach out to emergency services, so you can get the assistance you need as quickly as possible. Be found with Find My. Use Find My to share your location via satellite so friends and family know where you are. Before you go off grid, add the contacts you plan to share your location with using your paired iPhone or Ultra 3. More sports | All-round champion. Apple Watch Ultra 3 ups your game in every sport. When you're cycling, it actively monitors your speed and efficiency so you can see your progress in real time. And in the water, it can track your sets as you swim, automatically detect stroke patterns and calculate your total distance. Time to clock your best. Find your Power Zones. Connect your personal power meter to Ultra 3 to estimate your Functional Threshold Power (FTP), the highest level of intensity theoretically maintainable for an hour. Your FTP enables Power Zones to show your current power, time in a zone and average power. Watch your cycling metrics on your iPhone. When you start a cycling workout on Ultra 3, it automatically shows up as a Live Activity on your iPhone - making it easier to see and safer when it's mounted on your handlebars.

Name: Canon RF 24-50mm F4.5-6.3 IS
Description: 1 YEAR WARRANTY White Boxed Lens Key Features: Full-Frame Lens STM Stepping AF Motor Optical Image Stabiliser Focus Control Ring Two Aspherical Elements Super Spectra Coating 7-Blade Diaphragm Compact and Lightweight Design Featuring a lightweight and compact design, the RF 24-50mm f/4.5-6.3 IS STM Lens is a versatile standard zoom covering wide-angle to normal-view focal lengths. Designed for everyday use and an excellent choice for vlogging and content creation, this lens is well-suited for landscapes, cityscapes, street scenes, portraits, products, and more. An STM stepping AF motor produces fast, smooth, and near-silent autofocus performance to support both stills and video recording, and an Optical Image Stabiliser compensates for up to 4.5 stops of camera shake to better enable taking sharp handheld photos in difficult lighting conditions. Standard wide-angle to telephoto zoom lens is designed for use with full-frame Canon RF-mount mirrorless cameras. STM stepping motor offers fast, quiet, smooth, and accurate autofocus performance that is ideal for video recording as well as still shooting. Optical Image Stabiliser technology compensates for up to 4.5 stops of camera shake to better enable taking sharp handheld photos in difficult lighting conditions. When paired with EOS R-series cameras featuring an In-Body Image Stabiliser (IBIS), up to 7 stops of shake correction are provided. Incorporates a focus control ring on the lens barrel that can directly adjust numerous settings including shutter speed, aperture, exposure compensation, and more. Located towards the front of the lens, this ring effectively adds a third dial to the camera's main dial and quick control dial. Two aspheric elements and a Super Spectra Coating minimise ghosting and flare. Minimum focusing distance of 11.8" for working with close-up subjects. Compact and lightweight lens weighs just 7.4 oz. What's in the box: Canon RF 24-50mm f/4.5-6.3 IS STM Lens (Canon RF) Canon E-58 II Lens Cap Canon Lens Dust Cap RF

Name: OM System Tough TG-7 Underwater Bundle (Red)
Description: 3 YEAR CAMERA WARRANTY Built to withstand the rugged conditions of outdoor life, the red OM System Tough TG-7 Digital Camera provides you with a high-quality point-and-shoot you can rely on. Included in the Underwater Bundle: OM System Tough TG-7 Red Olympus PT-059 Marine Case for TG-7 OM System CHS-09 Float Strap As seen on our TikTok: Unboxing Features Key Features: 12MP BSI CMOS Sensor 4x Optical Zoom f/2-4.9 Lens 25-100mm (35mm Equivalent) Water, Crush, Shock, Freeze & Dust proof 17 Compatible Accessories 3" 1.04m-Dot LCD Monitor TruePic VIII Image Processor 4K Video Recording and Full HD at 30 fps Built-In Wi-Fi, GPS, Field Sensor System USB-C Connectivity Document Your Journey Built to withstand the rugged conditions of outdoor life, the red OM System Tough TG-7 Digital Camera provides you with a high-quality point-and-shoot you can rely on. Its 12MP BSI CMOS sensor and TruePic VIII image processor deliver excellent photo and video performance even in low-light conditions with a wide maximum aperture of f/2 and ISO up to 12,800. While maintaining much of the previous model's framework, the TG-7 introduces several new features such as vertical video support, interval shooting, exposure smoothing, and USB-C connectivity. With these added benefits, you're well-prepared to capture scenes and upload them directly to your devices with ease by navigating the camera's 3" 1.04m-dot LCD Monitor. Additionally, the TG-7 is compatible with 17 unique accessories that can be purchased to further expand the camera's capabilities including fisheye/tele-converters, underwater housings, lens protection filters, and much more. Ultra Resilient The TG-7 is built to perform no matter the conditions youre faced with: IPX8-rated waterproof for underwater use to depths of 50 Freeze proof to temperatures as low as 14°F Shockproof to drops from as high as 7' Crush proof to withstand pressure up to 220 lbf Dust proof to protect the internal components of the camera Anti-fog design prevents condensation from forming inside the lenses Improved Video Functions The TG-7 improves upon an already impressive array of video functionality with the addition of some new features. Vertical video support allows you to seamlessly record video in vertical aspect ratios, perfect for vlogging and sharing on social media. Interval shooting enables you to take multiple photos spaced out over a set period of time to better capture action or time-lapses. Pro Capture mode helps you freeze the perfect moment in an action sequence by buffering images when the shutter button is at half-press. The TG-7 saves up to 70 images of the most recently buffered images both before and after the shutter button is released. Expansive Macro System Extend past the TG-7's 4x optical zoom with four macro shooting modes for capturing scenes up close. Select Microscope mode to capture images with an incredibly short minimum focusing distance of 0.39". To zoom up to 44x closer, switch to Microscope Control mode. Utilise Focus Stacking mode to merge multiple images and create one photo with great depth of field. Focus Bracketing allows you to capture up to 30 images at various focus points which can then be composited in post-production. Having these macro capabilities at your disposal makes it easy to capture the finest details of your subject and visualise creative perspectives that are unfamiliar to the naked eye. Advanced Underwater Shooting Photograph and record video at depths as deep as 50 feet with generous features that simplify underwater shooting. Underwater White Balance mode provides a solution to regaining accurate colour tones that you can lose as you dive deeper underwater. 12MP BSI CMOS Sensor & TruePic VIII Processor Utilising a 12MP BSI CMOS sensor and TruePic VIII image processor, the TG-7 delivers brilliant stills and videos with rich colours. Both sides of the image sensor's sealing glass have an anti reflective coating that reduces flaring, which commonly occurs when shooting in conditions that have snow, dust, or sand. The sensor's BSI design coupled with a f/2 maximum aperture ensure cleaner image quality at higher ISO values. For maximum detail and control for photo editing, shoot in RAW format. The processor enables recording UHD 4K30p video and high-speed Full HD 1080p video at up to 120 fps. Keep Track While Adventuring The TG-7's Field Sensor System includes GPS, a manometer, a compass, and a thermometer allowing you to record important data about your environment and include it in your photos and videos. Easily transfer your recorded data and imagery to a mobile device using built-in Wi-Fi. In addition to wireless transfer, the built-in Wi-Fi also allows you to remotely control the camera. What's in the box: OM SYSTEM Tough TG-7 Digital Camera (Red) Hand Strap USB-C Cable Olympus LI-92B Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery (3.6V, 1350mAh)

Ultra Resilient The TG-7 is built to perform no matter the conditions youre faced with: IPX8-rated waterproof for underwater use to depths of 50 Freeze proof to temperatures as low as 14°F Shockproof to drops from as high as 7' Crush proof to withstand pressure up to 220 lbf Dust proof to protect the internal components of the camera Anti-fog design prevents condensation from forming inside the lenses Improved Video Functions The TG-7 improves upon an already impressive array of video functionality with the addition of some new features. Vertical video support allows you to seamlessly record video in vertical aspect ratios, perfect for vlogging and sharing on social media. Interval shooting enables you to take multiple photos spaced out over a set period of time to better capture action or time-lapses. Pro Capture mode helps you freeze the perfect moment in an action sequence by buffering images when the shutter button is at half-press. The TG-7 saves up to 70 images of the most recently buffered images both before and after the shutter button is released. Expansive Macro System Extend past the TG-7's 4x optical zoom with four macro shooting modes for capturing scenes up close. Select Microscope mode to capture images with an incredibly short minimum focusing distance of 0.39". To zoom up to 44x closer, switch to Microscope Control mode. Utilise Focus Stacking mode to merge multiple images and create one photo with great depth of field. Focus Bracketing allows you to capture up to 30 images at various focus points which can then be composited in post-production. Having these macro capabilities at your disposal makes it easy to capture the finest details of your subject and visualise creative perspectives that are unfamiliar to the naked eye. Advanced Underwater Shooting Photograph and record video at depths as deep as 50 feet with generous features that simplify underwater shooting. Underwater White Balance mode provides a solution to regaining accurate colour tones that you can lose as you dive deeper underwater. 12MP BSI CMOS Sensor & TruePic VIII Processor Utilising a 12MP BSI CMOS sensor and TruePic VIII image processor, the TG-7 delivers brilliant stills and videos with rich colours. Both sides of the image sensor's sealing glass have an anti reflective coating that reduces flaring, which commonly occurs when shooting in conditions that have snow, dust, or sand. The sensor's BSI design coupled with a f/2 maximum aperture ensure cleaner image quality at higher ISO values. For maximum detail and control for photo editing, shoot in RAW format. The processor enables recording UHD 4K30p video and high-speed Full HD 1080p video at up to 120 fps. Keep Track While Adventuring The TG-7's Field Sensor System includes GPS, a manometer, a compass, and a thermometer allowing you to record important data about your environment and include it in your photos and videos. Easily transfer your recorded data and imagery to a mobile device using built-in Wi-Fi. In addition to wireless transfer, the built-in Wi-Fi also allows you to remotely control the camera. Name: Nintendo Switch V.2 Red and Blue (Cert Refurb)
Description: 1 CERTIFIED REFURBISHED UNIT - REPAIRED BY NINTENDO ORIGINAL BOX AND ACCESSORIES - MISSING SOME INNER PACKAGING TOP USB SOCKET ON DOCK DIDN'T WORK - HAS BEEN FIXED In addition to providing single- and multi-player thrills at home, the Nintendo Switch system can be taken on the go, so players can enjoy a full home console experience anytime, anywhere. At home, the system rests in the Nintendo Switch Dock, which lets you play with family and friends on a TV in the comfort of your living room. By simply lifting Nintendo Switch from the dock at any time, the system near-instantly transitions to handheld mode, and the same great gaming experience now travels with you. The portability of Nintendo Switch is enhanced by its 6.2" screen, which displays bright, high-definition gameplay at the park, on an airplane, in a car, or at a friend's apartment. The Nintendo Switch comes with two Joy-Con, each of which can act as a standalone controller with an analogue stick, a full complement of face and shoulder buttons, built in motion-sensing, and "HD Rumble" technology. They can be inserted into the included Joy-Con Grip accessory, allowing them to be used like a traditional controller; held comfortably in each hand, allowing for independent arm movement; or shared between two players, allowing for instant multiplayer gaming. Thanks to the built-in kickstand, you can have two-player sessions in front of the TV or anywhere else. Home Gaming System At home, the main unit rests in the Nintendo Switch Dock, which connects the system to the TV and lets you play with family and friends in the comfort of your living room. On-the-Go Lift the Nintendo Switch from the dock, and it near-instantly transitions to handheld mode for on-the-go gaming. By sharing Joy-Con, players can go head-to-head while away from your TV. You can also enjoy the same great games in tabletop mode by using the built-in kickstand to prop the system up. New Play Styles Remove the detachable Joy-Con from either side of Nintendo Switch for more play styles: one player can use a Joy-Con in each hand, or two players can each take one. Connect up to eight Joy-Con controllers for a variety of gameplay options. Joy-Con Controllers When used together, the Joy-Con replicate traditional inputs of previous platforms, including dual two analogue sticks, A/B/X/Y buttons and directional buttons (in lieu of a d-pad), and four shoulder buttons. Each Joy-Con can be used as a single controller. When playing this way, Joy-Con (L) and Joy-Con (R) have the same layout. When a Joy-Con is held horizontally, the SL and SR buttons on top can be use as shoulder buttons. (Attaching the included Joy-Con Strap makes these buttons more prominent.) Capture Button: The Capture Button is located on Joy-Con (L) and is used to take gameplay screen shots. The player can then view, edit (add text of various sizes, colours and positions), and post them to popular social media networks Motion Control: Each Joy-Con includes a gyroscope and accelerometer. HD Rumble: Both Joy-Con include advanced HD Rumble, which can provide compatible games with subtle, realistic vibrations, allowing you to, for example, feel the sensation of individual ice cubes colliding inside a glass when shaking a Joy-Con. IR Motion Camera: Joy-Con (R) includes an IR Motion Camera that can detect the distance, shape, and motion of nearby objects in specially designed games. For example, it can tell how far away a player's hand is, and even if the hand is forming a rock, paper or scissors shape. amiibo: There is an NFC reader/writer located on Joy-Con (R). (This is also included in the separately sold Nintendo Switch Pro Controller.) The Nintendo Switch is compatible with existing amiibo; usage is game-dependent. Rechargeable: Joy-Con charge while attached to a Nintendo Switch system, both in the Dock and in handheld mode. They can also be charged using a Nintendo Switch Charging Grip accessory (sold separately). Release Button: On the back of each Joy-Con is a small button that is pressed to detach the controller from the main unit. They slide on and off using a built-in rail system. Enhanced Parental Controls The system includes various on-device parental controls, but parents can also download a smart device application that can be used to easily and conveniently monitor and set parental controls for a Nintendo Switch system. More System Features Screen Nintendo Switch has a 6.2-inch capacitive multi-touch screen with a resolution of 1280 x 720. Video Output When using the Nintendo Switch Dock, signals up to 1080p can be output via HDMI. Audio Output TV Mode supports 5.1-channel surround sound. Using the system's built-in audio jack, stereo speakers or headphones can be used when played in handheld or tabletop modes. Battery Battery life can last for up to six hours, but this will vary depending on the software and usage conditions. For example, The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild can be played for roughly three hours on a single charge. While away from home, Nintendo Switch can be charged via its USB Type-C port. Storage Nintendo Switch has 32GB of internal storage, a portion of which is reserved for use by the system, and has the option to expand its capacity using microSDXC or microSDHC memory cards. USB Ports USB ports on the Nintendo Switch dock can be used to charge accessories, such as the Nintendo Switch Pro Controller and Joy-Con attached to a Joy-Con charging grip. Networking The Nintendo Switch can connect to the Internet via a wireless (IEEE 802.11ac) connection. In addition, up to 8 systems can connect over a local wireless connection in compatible multiplayer games. While docked, Nintendo Switch can also use a wired Internet connection by connecting a separately available USB LAN adaptor.

Name: Sigma 16-300mm F3.5-6.7 DC OS | C Canon RF Fit
Description: 3 Year Warranty The Sigma 16-300mm F3.5-6.7 DC OS | Contemporary features an 18.8x zoom ratio, the world’s largest for an APS-C format mirrorless lens. Covering the entire range from wide-angle to super-telephoto, this extremely versatile lens brings the full range of photographic subjects within reach, from landscapes and portraits to wildlife and sports photography. With a maximum magnification ratio of 1:2, the 16-300mm F3.5-6.7 DC OS | Contemporary captures detailed close-ups with ease. Its HLA (High-response Linear Actuator) motor provides exceptionally fast, smooth and accurate autofocus – ideal for fast-moving subjects such as birds and aircraft. The lens offers 6 stops of image stabilization at the wide end and 4.5 stops *2 at the telephoto end, helping photographers achieve blur-free results even at longer focal lengths and in low light. This ultra versatile all-in-one zoom is the perfect tool for creative photographers who want to work in a wide range of photographic genres. The Sigma 16-300mm F3.5-6.7 DC OS | Contemporary is the world’s first mirrorless lens with an 18.8x zoom ratio. Equivalent to 24-450mm* in 35mm format, this portable lens covers everything from wide-angle for landscapes and interiors to super-telephoto for sports, wildlife and aviation. * Approximately 25.6-480mm for the Canon RF Mount version. With a maximum magnification ratio of 1:2 at 70mm, the Sigma 16-300mm F3.5-6.7 DC OS | Contemporary provides excellent close-up performance, perfect for capturing flowers, insects and other small subjects in great detail. With a maximum magnification of 1:3 at the wide end and 1:4 at the telephoto end, photographers have access to a huge range of creative expression. Despite its impressive zoom range of 16-300mm, the Sigma 16-300mm F3.5-6.7 DC OS | Contemporary prioritizes high portability, measuring just 73.8mm in diameter by 121.4mm in length and weighing just 615g*. This is achieved through advanced mechanical and optical design, including a high refractive index glass element with significant thickness variation and an aspherical lens element. Name: PocketBook Era Color Bundle - Karl Lagerfeld Sunset Copper
Description: PocketBook Era Color: colourful adventures, always with you The PocketBook Era Color impresses with its 7-inch display, equipped with the E-Ink Kaleido 3 colour display. Enter the colourful world of books: whether comics, mangas, guidebooks or cookbooks - enjoy the whole world in colour now! Eye comfort and colourful reading pleasure The PocketBook Era Color impresses with a 7-inch screen that can display a whopping 4096 colours, making your reading experience both easy on the eyes and glare-free. With SMARTlight technology, you can customise the lighting of the reading light: From a cool daylight to a warm, soothing yellow tone to ensure optimal reading comfort at any time of day. User-friendly and familiar design With the same design as the PocketBook Era, the handling of the PocketBook Era Colour is already familiar and excellent. It has a control panel on the side with mechanical buttons, complemented by a G-sensor for automatic screen rotation, which makes reading equally comfortable for right- and left-handed users. Audio functions for a complete experience With its built-in speakers, the PocketBook Era Color can also excel in those moments when you'd rather listen than read. The device supports various audiobook formats, enabling wireless audio playback not only via the speaker, but also via Bluetooth. With the text-to-speech function, text files can be converted into audio content, making your library more accessible than ever. Water protection for adventurous readers The PocketBook Era Color is equipped with IPX8 water protection, making it ideal for reading by the pool or even in the bath. This e-reader is designed to withstand submersion in fresh water up to two metres deep for up to one hour. A device that can do it all And that's not all: with support for 25 book and graphic formats, including popular comic formats such as CBR and CBZ, six audio formats for your listening pleasure and a generous 32 GB of internal memory, the PocketBook Era Color is as versatile as it is powerful. A quad-core processor ensures fast page-turning. With dual-band Wi-Fi, cloud services and pre-installed dictionaries, this e-reader is perfectly suited to the needs of modern readers. Name: Kodak S8 Vision3 200T/7213
Description: Kodak VISION3 200T is a medium-speed tungsten-balanced colour negative movie film characterized by the fine grain structure of a 100-speed film with the flexible nominal sensitivity of a 200-speed index. It has a wide exposure latitude with exceptional highlight control for working in a variety of lighting conditions, ranging from high contrast outdoor lighting to mixed interior light situations. As part of the VISION3 series of movie films, this stock has high archival stability and is well-suited to digital post-production processes. With the removal of the Remjet layer and the incorporation of a process-surviving antistatic and scratch-resistant back side layer, VISION3 200T no longer attracts unwanted sediment and provides a cleaner image for scanning and printing. To ensure sensitometric consistency and interchangeability with previous stocks during shooting, processing, and splicing, VISION3 features an anti-halation protective undercoat layer (AHU) on its emulsion side, and its film support remains an acetate base. This item is one 50' cartridge of single perf. Super 8 colour negative film for process in ECN-2 chemistry.

Name: OM System OM-5 Mark II Body Black
Description: 3 YEAR CAMERA WARRANTY Returning to the light footprint and high- res imaging standards OM System is known for, the second-generation OM-5 Mark II Mirrorless Camera boasts improvements in comfort and convenience to reassert itself at the apex of adventure-friendly cameras. Key Features: 20.4MP Live MOS Micro Four Thirds Sensor TruePic IX Image Processor DCI 4K/24p & UHD 4K/30p Video Recording 5-Axis Sensor-Shift Image Stabilisation IP53-Rated, Weather-Sealed Construction 121-Point Hybrid Contrast + Phase AF SD Memory Card Slot 2.36m-Dot Eye-Level OLED EVF 3.0" 1.04m-Dot Vari-Angle Touchscreen Wi-Fi and Bluetooth What's New in the Mark II USB-C Charging The OM-5 Mark II has a USB-C port allowing both power delivery and high-speed transfer of photos and video. The new port also makes it possible to use portable power banks, available separately, to charge the camera on the go for all-day shooting in any environment. Computational Photography Button The computational photography button, located on the camera's top plate next to the shutter release button, gives the user direct access to a wide array of creative tools, such as High-Res Shot, Live ND, Focus Stacking, HDR, and Multiple Exposure modes without having to enter the menu. New Shooting Modes Two new creative shooting modes were designed specifically to aid low-light shooters: Night Vision mode brings out the details of a scene shrouded in darkness, clearly displaying both the night sky and the foreground and simplifying composition. Hand Held Assist allows users to gauge the stability of handheld long exposures in real time. New Colour Profiles The OM-5 features two new video colour profiles, the OM Cinema 1 & 2, meant to help the user achieve a cinematic look to video footage without requiring special processing or grading. Imaging Details & Body Design 20.4MP Live MOS Sensor and TruePic IX Image Processor The original's 20.4MP Live MOS sensor and TruePic IX image processor return, working together to provide fast shooting performance, a sensitivity range up to ISO 25600, 4K video recording capabilities, and a continuous shooting rate of up 30 fps when shooting in the camera's Pro Capture mode, which enables users to half-press the shutter button to begin capturing fast-moving subjects before normal shooting begins. 121-Point All Cross-Type Phase-Detection AF An advanced autofocus system combines both 121 phase-detection AF points and 121 contrast-detection AF points for focusing performance that is both quick and accurate. All 121 phase-detection points are cross-type for improved precision in mixed lighting conditions, providing enhanced subject tracking capabilities. Different focusing modes are available to suit working in various shooting conditions as well, including Group Target 25-point mode for moving subjects such as birds and wildlife. Face and Eye subject detection modes are available, as well as Starry Sky AF mode as well as individual AF area settings for vertical and horizontal positions. 5-Axis Sensor-Shift Image Stabilisation In-body, sensor-shift image stabilisation helps to minimise the appearance of camera shake by up to 6.5 stops with any lens in use and compensates for camera movements that become especially noticeable when working with telephoto shots, macro imagery, and long exposures. The image stabilisation system works across five axes to compensate for vertical angle rotation, horizontal angle rotation, horizontal shift, vertical shift, and rolling camera shake movement. When paired with select lenses featuring optical image stabilisation, shake compensation up to 7.5 stops is possible. The system benefits use with the High-Res Shot and Hand Held Assist shooting modes, allowing you to capture sharp images with incredible detail, even in low light. Creative Shooting Modes In addition to Night Mode and Hand Held Assist, the OM-5 Mark II carries a variety of creative shooting modes: Simulating the effects of a neutral density filter, Live ND 16 mode results in blurred subject movement by combining exposures into a single image to replicate a photo taken at slower shutter speeds. This is particularly suitable for photographing moving water and clouds. Focus stacking mode records multiple sequential frames then composites the exposures into a single image that exhibits an extended depth of field. High-Res Shot mode offers the equivalent output of a 50MP image in handheld mode, and an 80MP image using a tripod. Live Composite mode gradually builds up an exposure over time without overexposing key elements within the frame and is ideal for long exposures, nigh time shooting, and light painting applications. Vertical Video mode provides a 9:16 aspect ratio for easily integrating videos on Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, and other similar platforms. Designed for the Elements IP53-rated, the OM-5 Mark II offers superior weather protection and withstands some of the harshest conditions in the field. Its tough construction renders the camera freeze proof, dust and splash-resistant, and operable at temperatures as low as 14°F. ZERO II (Zuiko Extra-low Reflection Optical) coating suppresses flare and ghosting for greater contrast and color fidelity when working in strong lighting conditions. Fast AF and Robust Sync IS Especially quick and responsive autofocus system suits working with quick-moving subjects and distant targets, including birds, wildlife, and sports scenes. Name: Sigma 18-50mm F2.8 DC DN | Contemporary | Sony E Fit
Description: 3 YEAR SIGMA WARRANTY A high-performance standard zoom for crop cameras / Small but perfectly formed, the 18-50mm F2.8 is the ultimate portable standard zoom for crop-sensor mirror-less cameras. With an equivalent focal length of 27-75mm on an APS-C camera the lens is well-suited to a wide range of photo and video applications, including landscape, portrait, street and architectural photography. It can also be used for macro-style photography owing to its impressive maximum magnification ratio of 1:2.8. A constant F2.8 aperture makes it easy to achieve blurry backgrounds, which is ideal for shooting attractive portraits and close-ups. Auto-focus is exceptionally fast and quiet thanks to the lens stepping motor, which can be particularly useful for shooting video or for capturing fast-moving subjects. Weighing less than 300g, the 18-50mm is easily portable enough to be carried around for casual day-to-day shooting, but thanks to its outstanding optics, fast AF and wide aperture, it is more than capable of delivering professional-quality results. Features and build / The external barrel of the 18-50mm F2.8 is constructed using a polymer called Thermally Stable Composite (TSC). This has a similar thermal expansion rate to aluminium, meaning that the metal interior of the lens and the TSC exterior behave in the same way as temperatures change. TSC is also light and strong, and has a sleek finish. Ultra-sharp optics / Despite being extremely small and light at under 300g, the 18-50mm F2.8 DC DN | C delivers outstanding optical quality at all aperture settings. Optical performance is maintained across the whole frame, meaning fine detail is rendered perfectly right into the corners. The lens has an advanced optical design made up of 13 elements in 10 groups, including 3 aspherical elements and 1 SLD element. These ensure razor-sharp results and work with in-camera digital corrections to eliminate chromatic aberration, flare, distortion and vignetting. The lens has advanced optical coatings which reduce flare and ghosting when working in bright direct sunlight especially important at the wider end of the zoom range. The lens has an internal focus mechanism, so the lens always remains the same length when the subject distance changes. This makes it well suited to gimbal use due to a relatively constant centre of gravity, and it also means the end of the lens doesnt rotate when focusing important when using filters. The lens has a stepping motor that delivers smooth, fast and accurate AF for both stills and video. It has been designed with lighter glass elements in the focus lens group, which ensures responsive auto-focus that is fully compatible with all the latest AF camera technology. The durable brass mount is surrounded by a rubber seal to help keep out dust and moisture. Name: Reflecta DigitDia Evolution Slide Scanner
Description: With the innovative DigitDia evolution you can now view and digitise your entire slide archive directly from the magazines. The computer-independent device is very easy to operate. As with a conventional slide projector, the slides are played back immediately after being inserted into the device. This is done on a brilliant IPS display that is integrated in the unit. Optionally, you can also connect an external monitor, a TV set or a projector via the HDMI output of the DigitDia evolution. This means that a classic slide show is once again possible. Both playback and digitisation of the slides can be done manually or automatically. The automatic scanning of a complete magazine with 50 slides is done in only four minutes in best resolution, whereby the digital images are saved directly on an SD card. Features: Slides that can be used: frames (5 x 5 cm) with a thickness of up to 3.2 mm Image sensor: 1 / 2.33" - 15.3 megapixel CMOS sensor Resolution: 4608 x 3072 pixels or 5760 x 3840 pixels (interp.) Scanning speed: less than 5 seconds per slide (automatic mode) Display: 17.8 cm (7") IPS with wide viewing angle Colour correction: red, green, blue (RGB -2,0 EV to +2,0 EV) Exposure compensation: automatic manual (-2,0 EV to +2,0 EV) Light source: diffuse daylight LED light source for optimal colour rendering. Reduces dust and scratches. Digital output format: JPEG (low compression) Usable magazines: Universal (DIN 108), CS, LKM Supported memory cards: SD/SDHC cards with up to 128 GB Power supply: Mains adapter 12V/1.5A Video interface: HDMI (Type A)

Slides must be placed individually into the scanner opening, and film strips must be manually advanced through the scanner (no automatic film strip transport!). The high scan speed and the hardware-based ICE3™ dust and scratch removal ensure efficient operation. Description: It's never been easier to rescue and digitize your old film treasures. Simply select between Regular 8 and Super 8, insert the film, and start the Reflecta Film Scanner Super 8 – Regular 8. The film is scanned frame by frame at a speed of two frames per second and saved directly to an SD card as an HD-quality MP4 video. No computer or software is required. The digitized films can be played on all smartphones, tablets, or PCs. The scanner can also be connected directly to a television for playback. Description: The Reflecta x66-Scan multi-format scanner allows high-quality digitization of various film formats from different eras of photography with just one device. The scanner features a brilliant display with a diagonal of 10.9 cm and a wide viewing angle, making selecting, scanning, and viewing images a real pleasure. The x66-Scan digitizes an image in less than two seconds at a resolution of up to 22 megapixels and saves it directly as a JPEG file on an SD card. The holders also ensure optimal flatness of the originals and gentle handling of the valuable film material. The time required for each scanning process is less than two seconds. Name: Samsung S32FM801UU 32-inch 4K HDR10+ Smart Monitor
Description: The Samsung S32FM801UU Smart Monitor M8 combines the functions of a classic PC monitor with the advantages of a modern smart TV and is aimed at users who want to combine work, streaming and entertainment on one device. The 32-inch display with Ultra HD 4K resolution (3840 x 2160) uses a VA panel that impresses with high contrast values and deep blacks. With a typical brightness of 400 cd/m², a contrast ratio of 3000:1 and 178° horizontal and vertical viewing angles, the monitor delivers a sharp and consistent image for office work, multimedia and creative applications. The refresh rate of up to 60 Hz and a response time of 4 ms (G/G) ensure stable display in everyday use. As a smart monitor, the S32FM801UU offers an integrated smart TV experience based on the Tizen operating system. Streaming apps and online services can be used directly without the need to connect a PC. In addition, the monitor supports voice control via Bixby, integration into the SmartThings ecosystem, and wireless functions such as mobile-to-screen mirroring, Tap View, and Sound Mirroring, allowing content to be conveniently displayed from a smartphone or tablet. The Smart Monitor is also well equipped in terms of connectivity and convenience. A USB-C port with up to 65 watts of Power Delivery enables image transmission, data connection and simultaneous charging of compatible devices via a single cable. This is complemented by USB-A ports and an HDMI input. The ergonomic stand allows for height adjustment and a pivot function, which is particularly useful during longer working periods or when reading in portrait mode. Integrated 10-watt stereo speakers with Adaptive Sound Pro also ensure solid audio playback without the need for external speakers. Additional comfort and protection features round off the overall package. The AI Picture Optimizer automatically adjusts the image display to different content, while Eye Saver Mode and Flicker-Free technology reduce eye strain during prolonged use. With its combination of high-resolution display, smart features and versatile connectivity options, the Samsung S32FM801UU is suitable for both productive work and entertainment applications. Name: Samsung S27D304GAU 27-inch LED IPS FHD Monitor

The combination of design, ergonomics and smooth image display makes the S27D304GAU a practical choice for users who value comfort and good image quality. Name: Mobile Pixels Fold 15.6" FHD Screen Extension
Description: The Mobile Pixels Fold 15.6" Portable Monitor adds a high-resolution Full HD screen (1920 × 1080 pixels) to the laptop and is suitable for work as well as gaming or entertainment. With a matte IPS panel, 300 candela per square meter brightness and a contrast ratio of 1000:1, content is displayed clearly, with true colours and low reflection. A response time of 25 milliseconds and a refresh rate of 60 hertz ensure smooth displays, while the 8-bit colour depth with 16.7 million colours supports precise reproduction. The monitor is ultra-flat with a depth of just 6 millimetres and weighs only 720 grams, making it easy to transport. A robust magnetic cover protects the screen from scratches and moisture during transportation and also serves as a flexible stand with two stable viewing angles. Audio is provided by an integrated dual stereo system with two loudspeakers (1 watt each) and a 3.5 mm headphone socket. The hybrid signal solution with two USB-C ports (full-featured, PD, reverse charging) and a mini HDMI port enables a simple plug-and-play connection without driver installation. With broad compatibility with macOS, Windows, Linux, ChromeOS, tablets, smartphones (including Samsung DeX) and consoles such as Nintendo Switch, Xbox and PlayStation, the monitor is versatile. Name: Apple Watch 11 Space Grey 46mm aluminium case (S/M) with Black Sport Band
Tags: apple-watch, Gift Idea, Smart Watch, sport-fitness
Description: Apple Watch Series 11 | The ultimate way to watch your health. | Take a closer look. | Health | Know your body by heart. The more insights you have, the more empowered you are to take action. From the ECG app to the Vitals app and more, Apple Watch Series 11 provides a bigger picture of your health, so you can stay informed. More features to empower your health. | Wake up to your sleep score. Sleep quality is influenced by factors such as sleep duration, bedtime consistency, how often you wake up and time spent in each sleep stage. Sleep score analyses these factors every night and provides a classification and a score. You'll see how the score is calculated, so you can understand the quality of your sleep and learn how to make it more restorative. Keep an eye on sleep apnoea. Sleep apnoea is a condition where people experience repeated interruptions in their regular respiratory pattern during sleep. if untreated, sleep apnoea can have important consequences on your health. Series 11 can monitor for breathing disturbances over time and notify you of possible sleep apnoea. The Vitals app. Your daily health status, stat. Quickly see your overnight health data - including heart rate, respiratory rate, wrist temperature, blood oxygen and sleep duration - and get notified if multiple metrics are ever outside your typical range. Follow your heart on the ECG app. With Series 11 you can check for signs of atrial fibrillation, or AFib, from your wrist by using the ECG app to generate a single-lead electrocardiogram. Stay on the pulse with the Heart Rate app . You can check your heart rate at any time - and get automatic notifications for a high or low heart rate or an irregular rhythm. Cycle Tracking keeps you in the loop. Since cycles vary, the best way to understand what's normal for you is by tracking your menstrual cycle. You can use Cycle Tracking to log your period, record symptoms, and get predictions about your next period or fertile window.11 It can also notify you if a cycle deviation is detected. Get retrospective ovulation estimates. Series 11 has advanced sensors that track your wrist temperature while you sleep.5 The Cycle Tracking app uses this data to provide a retrospective estimate of when you likely ovulated, which can be helpful for family planning. Measure your blood oxygen. It's a breathtaking innovation. The sensor and app in Apple Watch Series 11 allow you to take on-demand readings of your blood oxygen as well as background readings, day and night. Fitness | Better by every measure. Whether you're training for a marathon or swimming laps, Apple Watch Series 11 serves up endless ways to work out. And it uses helpful metrics to count every move, so you know how to push harder and train smarter. Let's go - the starting line is on your wrist. A refreshed Workout app. An improved layout highlights four new corner buttons, making it even quicker to access your go-to features like Pacer, Race Route and Custom Workout. Run circles around your Activity rings. Move. Exercise. Stand. The Activity app can track your daily activity. You can easily pause your rings or adjust your goals for each day of the week.

Name: Samsung Galaxy Tab S10 Lite EE 128GB Wifi Grey
Description: The Samsung Galaxy Tab S10 Lite is a versatile tablet designed for everyday use. With a 10.9-inch TFT display (WUXGA+), it offers clear and vivid visuals for media consumption, productivity and creative applications. Name: Asus TUF VG279QE5A 27-inch Gaming Monitor
Description: The ASUS TUF Gaming VG279QE5A is a 27-inch gaming monitor that stands out thanks to its responsive display and numerous gaming extras. With an IPS panel and Full HD resolution (1920 x 1080), it appeals to both casual and competitive gamers. Overclocking up to 146 Hz ensures particularly smooth motion, and in combination with Adaptive-Sync technology, the monitor ensures seamless image transitions. Thanks to ELMB Sync, you can experience fast image changes with reduced ghosting and low tearing – an advantage especially in action-packed scenes. In terms of features, the VG249QE5A offers solid connectivity: it has HDMI 2.0 and DisplayPort 1.2 inputs, as well as a headphone jack for audio output.
